Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (14% odds) on crude drop below $70. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $80 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (48% YES) crude drop below $80. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $105 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (30%) that crude reach $105. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Other.title: Will Naftali Bennett be the next Prime Minister of Israel?
Other.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Trade & Policy.title: Ukraine agrees not to join NATO by June 30?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Trump agree to Iranian oil sanction relief by May 31?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 25 bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 98% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 67% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Weather & Climate.title: Will Trump agree to unfreeze Iranian assets by May 31?
Weather & Climate.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.
